message:
fix: stop auto-started dolt servers on DoltStore.Close()

Reference counting for auto-started servers prevents test leaking
(GH#2542). When the last store referencing an auto-started server
is closed, the server is stopped.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2562
Co-authored-by: matt wilkie <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
